sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 88:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 88:1
items.html: See in Inner Observation, at the end of Part 1. It explains there that spiritual time is considered motion, and spiritual motion is considered an innovation of form that is attained there. From this we understand that the slightest innovation of form, the slightest of the slightest of changes, is called a “moment.”
